name: Documents
description: Read and analyze local files and documents: answer questions about file contents, search text within files, summarize documents. Use when the user asks about what's IN a file, not when they want to create or write files.
author: MUSE

actions.description: Answer a question about the contents of a file or folder
Search for content across files in a directory
Summarize a document or set of files
Index a folder for faster future searches
